name: Penne in Tomato Sauce with Crabmeat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Lump crabmeat, picked over and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet.
2. Add the onions and parsley; sauté until onions soften, about 3 minutes.
3. Add reserved juices from the canned tomatoes; simmer until thickened slightly, about 10 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and wine; simmer to blend flavors, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the crabmeat; simmer until heated through, about 3 minutes.
6. Season with 1/2 teaspoon salt and 1/4 teaspoon ground pepper or to taste.
7. Meanwhile, bring 6 quarts water to boil in a soup kettle.
8. Add 1 tablespoon salt and penne; cook until just tender, about 9 minutes.
9. Drain and return penne to soup kettle.
10. Add sauce; toss to combine. Serve immediately.
